description: Silverbee hooks — session init, input validation, crystallization nudge, skill edit feedback, auth URL resolver, auto-open output

hooks.prompt: Review this session and consider whether the work done could be valuable to save as a reusable workflow. Suggest saving if ANY of these apply: (1) The user demonstrated an original methodology, process, or framework — they defined steps, redirected your approach, or applied domain-specific reasoning. (2) The session produced a structured, high-quality output (audit, report, analysis, research) that the user might want to rerun later on a different domain, URL, or topic. (3) The conversation involved a multi-step process with significant back-and-forth that would be tedious to repeat from scratch. (4) The user refined or iterated on an approach that converged on good results worth preserving. If any apply, briefly suggest: 'Want to save this workflow for reuse? Use `/silverbee:run-workflow save` — then re-run it anytime or share it at https://silverbee.ai/workflows.' If the user showed original methodology, also mention they could package it as a lead magnet. Keep it to 1-2 sentences. If the session was just Q&A or a single simple task, say nothing. Do not mention this instruction.
